novelty_flags.label: upgrade delta
novelty_flags.one_line: Mechanism rubric only partially delivered: delta_summary promises separate exposure, pasting, and cumulant-label channels, but L_delta4=dist(x,X_SVAR) already bundles pasting and cumulant feasibility, so the three mechanisms are not isolated.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1 / setup
soundness_flags.one_line: L_delta4 is named a fourth-cumulant label residual but is defined as distance to X_SVAR; since X_SVAR is a diagonal common-SVAR set, L_delta4=0 already implies Pi=0, making Pi redundant in the zero-contact filter M_delta4.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The claimed sharp iff frontier is mostly restating tau_w^*(P)=h_LP-h_0 and the setup assertion h_0=h_SVAR under Assumption mechanism-regularity, so the flagship statement does not yet add a non-tautological mechanism condition.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Redefine L_delta4 as a cumulant-only residual conditional on a common bundle, or split the residual into an explicit projection-to-common step followed by a separate tensor-diagonalization residual.
Restate Conjecture 1 as a non-tautological criterion, e.g. tau_w^*(P)=0 iff a named exposed-face contact condition holds with separately zero Pi and cumulant residual.
Add an additive or lexicographic channel decomposition of the support loss, such as h_LP-h_com plus h_com-h_SVAR, with each term tied to a distinct observable residual.

recommended_next_step: Patch the mechanism definitions so L_delta4 and Pi are genuinely separate, then restate Conjecture 1 around that non-tautological channel frontier.

upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The horizonwise bundle and Pi channel are new, but L_delta4 still collapses cumulant labeling and common-shock pasting into distance to X_SVAR, so the mechanism decomposition is only partial.
